title: README fixture loading example contradicts actual test helper
description: README.md (tests/fixtures/README.md §Adding a New Fixture, step 5) says to load fixtures with include_str!, but every test in methods_test.rs loads them with std::fs::read_to_string via the fixture() helper and env!("CARGO_MANIFEST_DIR"). A contributor following the README will write tests that embed the fixture at compile time rather than using the shared helper, making two inconsistent patterns coexist. Fix: update the README step to show the fixture() helper pattern, or remove the include_str! reference.
